code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws affecting regular use
    - Language like "cheap," "useless," "misleading description"
    - Partial functionality with immediate failures

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons
    - "Average," "works but with limitations"
    - Adequate for specific uses without enthusiasm

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear positives with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basics but has imperfections
    - Comparisons to better products while still recommending
    - Temporary satisfaction without long-term confidence

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm + recommendation
    - Core excellence outweighs minor issues
    - Explicit repurchasing despite drawbacks
    - Transforms experience through utility
    - "Pleasantly surprised" exceeding low expectations
    - Emotional language overriding neutral observations
    - Final positive verdict after initial doubts

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive dominates →5
    - Practical tips without dissatisfaction →5
    - Temporary satisfaction + doubts →4
    - Specific-use praise + other limitations →5 if primary use achieved
    - Minor criticism + repurchase intent →5
    - Material concerns + enthusiastic endorsement →5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids crack easily and leak during transport. Not worth the price despite working occasionally."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Vibrant blue transformed my kitchen! Material thin compared to premium brands but works well."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Frankly I'm at odds with these sheets but overall ended up happy...with reservations. Better than others I've tried!"
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "I bought these mainly for sending leftovers. Will keep repurchasing - worth it despite minor leaks!"
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "Perfect snack bags if you don't overstuff. Seal fails when packed full, but ideal for light use."
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: "Initially doubted durability, but 6 months later still perfect! Worth every penny."
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Great for decor but too rough for comfort. Exactly what I needed for styling."
Rating: 4

Example 10:
Review: "UPDATE: Major problems resolved through customer service. Now my favorite appliance!"
Rating: 5
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (28 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 9
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Had these for one day. While the medium size one was able to save a piece of fruit without a problem the larger one broke the same day I got it when I tried using it to keep a summer sausage fresh as shown in the picture. Wouldn't recommend nor would..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [4, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [4, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 28 errors, 11 borderline out of 64 examples."}
